items.title: CVE-1999-0095
items.summary: This vulnerability (CVE-1999-0095) involves the debug command being enabled in Sendmail, a widely used mail transfer agent. When active, this feature allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary commands with root privileges, granting complete control over the affected system. This is the historic flaw famously exploited by the 1988 Morris Worm.
